root: ^Noelle: Wow! This one has such a cool color! What's it called?
^Sam: I believe the guys at the dock said it was a Spotted Cod, it's the biggest one I've seen in months!
^Noelle: Where does it get that blue shine?
^Sam: Something about copper in the water or food they eat - the copper dyes them greener and that mixes with their scales to make them look blue.
^Noelle: Could I keep this one? Blue is my favorite color!
^Sam: Sure thing. Be sure to freeze it if you don't want it to go bad...
